description: In this episode, the host welcomes a legendary trader to discuss trading strategies, particularly in crypto. The guest shares their journey from stock trading on Robin Hood to focusing on crypto, highlighting a pivotal moment during the FTX crisis when they executed a significant short trade after observing withdrawal pauses [t=134.09].
topic_summary: The podcast covers trading news, strategies for making money in crypto, and personal trading experiences, including a notable FTX trade that led to substantial gains [t=134.09].
